name: Onelogin Active Accounts Missing Email
description: Detects active onelogin accounts missing an email address for identity matching and offboarding controls.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.username AS account_name FROM onelogin_users u WHERE COALESCE(u.status, 0) = 1 AND COALESCE(TRIM(u.email), '') = ''
remediation: Populate a valid corporate email on the account or disable the account until ownership can be verified.
